notes: Seed catalog for fuzzy-matching brand and model names from voice transcription. Aliases include phonetic misspeakings, common shortenings, and Whisper-induced garbles. season values: summer | winter | all-season | all-weather | all-terrain | mud-terrain | performance | touring. Grows via the chat agent's learn_tire_term tool — runtime additions get committed to git like any other change.
